Bhagavad Gita
Essence
A curated journey through sacred wisdom

"You have a right to perform your prescribed duties,
but you are not entitled to the fruits of your actions."

— Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 2, Verse 47
ॐ
By Grace of Lord Krishna

You are encouraged to read the entire Bhagavad Gita as the following slides are excerpts and not the complete Bhagavad Gita.

The following two indexes offer different pathways — the first is Chapter-wise, the second is based on human emotions and questions of the heart.
